mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.slug, a.title, a.summary, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.cover_image AS coverUrl, c.name AS categoryName, IFNULL(v.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, IFNULL(v.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, IFNULL(v.share_count, 0) AS shareCount, IFNULL(v.view_count, 0) AS viewCount FROM articles a JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id LEFT JOIN v_article_stats v ON v.article_id = a.id WHERE a.status = 'published' AND c.status = 'published' ORDER BY a.published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles a JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id WHERE a.status = 'published' AND c.status = 'published' AND c.slug = #{slug}

SELECT a.id, a.slug, a.title, a.summary, a.published_at AS publishedAt, a.cover_image AS coverUrl, c.name AS categoryName, IFNULL(v.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, IFNULL(v.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, IFNULL(v.share_count, 0) AS shareCount, IFNULL(v.view_count, 0) AS viewCount FROM articles a JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id LEFT JOIN v_article_stats v ON v.article_id = a.id WHERE a.status = 'published' AND c.status = 'published' AND c.slug = #{slug} ORDER BY a.published_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.id, a.slug, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.cover_image AS coverUrl, c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, c.slug AS categorySlug, IFNULL(v.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, IFNULL(v.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, IFNULL(v.share_count, 0) AS shareCount, a.view_count AS viewCount FROM articles a JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id LEFT JOIN v_article_stats v ON v.article_id = a.id WHERE a.slug = #{slug} AND a.status = 'published' AND c.status = 'published' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, article_id AS articleId, source_name AS sourceTitle, source_url AS sourceUrl, source_type AS sourceType FROM article_sources WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 'visible'
